menu:
• Ramen 14 €
    Each ramen has Tokumaru handmade noodles, slowly boiled broth, vegetables and nori seaweed. Meat portions come with marinated egg
  • Shoyu Ramen
    Chashu pork and soy sauce broth
  • Vegan Tantan Ramen (v)
    Fried tofu, shiitake mushrooms and tantan broth
  • Don 14 €
    Bowl of sushi rice, teriyaki sauce, green salad with sesame dressing, edamame beans, wakame, cherry tomato and marinated daikon.
  • Panko Chicken Don
    Breaded chicken and chili mayonnaise
  • Tofu Curry (v)
    Crispy breaded tofu cutlet with Japanese curry
